personas.name: Alex Rivera
personas.role: Asks for Senior Analyst learning guidance and authorizes Cornerstone in-channel

personas.name: HR Service Agent
personas.role: Detects 401 from Cornerstone, shows auth card via Unified Live context, resumes the original ask

content.text: What courses should I take if I'm aiming for the Senior Analyst role?
I'd be happy to find those internal roles and skill gaps for you! First, I just need your permission to securely access your Cornerstone learning profile.

content.oauthModalTitle: Sign in to Cornerstone with Slack

oauthUsageItems.text: Establish a verified connection between your existing Cornerstone OnDemand account and Slack.
Help Agentforce read your learning profile—completed courses, skill scores, and active paths—so recommendations stay accurate.
Unlock Cornerstone-aware features in Slack: personalized course suggestions, progress context, and in-thread actions from your HR agent.

content.statusText: Pulling your learning profile and building recommendations…

content.text:
I've analyzed your current skills in Cornerstone against the Senior Analyst requirements. Here is the suggested learning path for you.

*Senior Analyst — suggested learning path*
• *Data & storytelling* — Advanced Excel for Analysts; Storytelling with Data (internal)
• *Finance depth* — Corporate Financial Modeling II; Budgeting & Forecasting lab
• *Stakeholder impact* — Influencing Without Authority; Executive-ready deck reviews (cohort)

*Skill gaps I'm seeing in your profile*
• Forecasting scenarios — not yet completed
• Cross-functional prioritization — one elective short

You can keep chatting here anytime—I'll stay synced with your Cornerstone profile in your workspace.
